notes: Cleaner split screens: the seam strip hides inside the source's own caption bar (bar text stays perfectly centered), and splits with no bar get no line at all - the halves join exactly as filmed. Hook text can never spill onto the first frame of the next section. Includes all 2.9.14-15 fixes: full hooks (no mid-action cuts), exact-scale splits, cut-aligned seams, live render countdown.
_urls: windows.url is the GitHub Release asset (stable, public, direct .exe) and sha256 pins the exact binary - the 2.9.8+ updater verifies the download against it before offering to install. mac stays EMPTY on purpose: the Mac build ships as a .zip, which the in-app updater does not run; Mac customers always get the newest build from app.lemonsqueezy.com/my-orders.
